titleStmt.title: SII 38.201: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 201. (A.R. No. 201 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: States that this record is a copy of royal order (see following no.). It registers an exemption of taxes such as antarāyam and pāṭṭam on eighty vēli of land at Kuḷattūr alias Kulōttuṅgasōḻankāvaṉūr which was separated from Puṉṉaivāyil alias Rājanārāyaṇa-chchaturvēdimaṅgalam (a sub-division) of Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻavaḷanāḍu. The land was donated by Duṟgayāṇḍāṉ Nāyakkan, an agent of Chittaraisan. The royal order exempting the above taxes were conveyed to the pontiff, superintendent of devotees and executive officials of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple. The donor made this land grant inorder to conduct worship at the Vyākyāna maṇḍapa, when the deity was pleased to appear there and also for the maintenance of both the students and teachers of Vyākarṇa, which was imparted at the above maṇḍapa, of the (Tiruvoṟṟiyūr) temple, constructed by the donor himself. The king on the recommendation of Vāṇādarāyaṉ got the above taxes exempted from his 38th year onwards. This order was taken down by the official (tirumandira ōlai) Neṟiuḍaichchōḻa Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, Villavarāyaṉ, Toṇḍaimāṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumukappaṭi .... svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭān jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkoyil maṭapatikkum śrīmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrī kāriyañceyvāṉukkum cittaraicaṉ kāriyattukku kaṭava tuṟkaiyāṇṭi nāyakkan Ikkoyilil ceyvikkiṟa vyākaraṇatāna vyākhyānamaṇḍapattu Ittevar Eḻun=taruḷum nāṭkaḷil pūcaikkum Immaṇṭapattu vyākaraṇamvācippārkkum vācippippārkkum veṇṭuvaṉa vai
yiṟṟukku Iṟuppatākap puḻaṟkoṭṭamāna vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṉṉaivāyilānairācanārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu piṟinta kuḷattūrāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaṉkāvaṉūr Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilam Eṇpatiṟṟu veliyum muppatteṭṭāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu vāṇatarāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭuk koḷLetters ḷ and k are engraved below their respective places.ḷakLetters ḷ and k are engraved below their respective places.kaṭavārkaḷāka vari
k kūṟuceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Iṉṉilam muppatteṭṭāvatu mutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoḷka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻamuventaveḷāne Eḻuttu villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu viḻiñattaraiyan Eḻuttu Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ciṅkaḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Irācatarāca viḻupparain Eḻuttu cittarāyaṉ Eḻuttu vayanāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu 3 10 8 100 2 100 3 10 9
Digital edition of SII 38.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
